title: RankGPT: How Far Are Large Language Models from Effective Rankers?

defines.name: RankGPT
defines.definition: A prompting and distillation framework that uses large language models to rank passages by directly generating permutations of candidate passages.

problem: Existing information retrieval methods rely on supervised rankers, while large language models are not naturally aligned with passage-ranking objectives and may be affected by data contamination concerns.
